case_title: SKLYAR, VLADIMIR (GUARDIAN) et al VS LIM, JOSEPH WING CHUEN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKLYAR, VLADIMIR (GUARDIAN) SKLYAR, ALEX (MINOR) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIM, JOSEPH WING CHUEN LIM, DAPHNE M CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CHANGE PLTF'S NAME TO: VLADIMIR SKYLAR AS GUARDIAN FOR ALEX SKYLAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SKLYAR, VLADIMIR (GUARDIAN) SKLYAR, ALEX (MINOR) AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JOSEPH WING CHUEN LIM, DAPHNE M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
